task_completion.description: Verify the post title, category, and tag are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field or live post displays exactly '2023 Significant Earthquakes Report'. In the WordPress settings sidebar, the category 'Data Journalism' is checked (and created) and the tag 'earthquakes' is added.

task_completion.description: Verify the Table of Contents exists at the top with the required hyperlinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or block at the top of the post containing 'Data Summary', 'Methodology', and 'Impact'. These items must be styled as hyperlinks (usually underlined or colored differently).

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the three required H2 headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headings 'Data Summary', 'Methodology', and 'Impact' are visible in the post body, formatted as large heading text (H2). If the block settings sidebar is visible, check that HTML anchors ('data-summary', 'methodology', 'impact') are set under the Advanced section.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV data is presented as a table with a header section under 'Data Summary'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A formatted table appears under the 'Data Summary' heading. The table must have a distinct header row and contain the earthquake data, specifically showing the locations: Kahramanmaras, Al Haouz, Herat, Jajarkot, and Jishishan.

task_completion.description: Verify the required text is present under the 'Methodology' heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Data sourced from the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Earthquake Hazards Program.' is visible directly beneath the 'Methodology' heading.

task_completion.description: Verify the required text is present under the 'Impact' heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'These seismic events caused significant infrastructure damage and required international humanitarian response.' is visible directly beneath the 'Impact' heading.

task_completion.description: Verify the blog post has been successfully published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Post published' notification is visible, the publish button has changed to 'Update', or the screenshot shows the live, published view of the blog post on the front-end.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface to create the post.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress Gutenberg editor or the live WordPress site in a web browser, not a terminal window injecting SQL or a text editor writing raw HTML files.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV data was converted into a proper table block, not just pasted as raw text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data under 'Data Summary' should be visually structured in a grid/table format with aligned columns and a distinct header row, rather than comma-separated text pasted into a standard paragraph block.

integrity.description: Verify headings are actual heading blocks rather than just bolded paragraph text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The headings should be noticeably larger than the body text and, if the editor is shown, should be contained within 'Heading' blocks rather than 'Paragraph' blocks with bold formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: '2023 Significant Earthquakes Report'. Expected Category: 'Data Journalism'. Expected Tag: 'earthquakes'. Expected Anchors for the headings: 'data-summary', 'methodology', 'impact'. The data table must contain the following locations extracted from the CSV: Kahramanmaras, Al Haouz, Herat, Jajarkot, Jishishan.
